headline: Is There Now an Opportunity in Salesforce (CRM) After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Wondering whether Salesforce at US$200.84 is priced for opportunity or disappointment? This article walks through what the current valuation actually reflects and how you might frame it as an investor. The stock has recently moved sharply, with returns of 12.2% over the last 7 days and 9.3% over the last 30 days, while year to date it is down 20.8% and over the last year it has declined 23.5%. Recent headlines around Salesforce have focused on its position as a large US software company and...

headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Salesforce’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Salesforce’s first quarter was shaped by accelerating adoption of its AI-powered platform, particularly Agentforce, which management credits for major customer productivity gains and workflow automation. CEO Marc Benioff highlighted that customer deployments of agentic technology are transforming business operations, with PenFed and UCLA Health cited as examples. headline: The 'Lifeboat Effect': Money Moving From Seat To Stack
summary: Shy Balore explains the "Lifeboat Effect" in the software market, where investment is shifting from traditional SaaS companies to the agentic AI stack. He details how AI agents are repricing legacy software and driving growth in orchestration, security, connectivity, and data layers. The discussion includes specific companies like Palantir, Salesforce, CrowdStrike, Zscaler, Cloudflare, Snowflake, and MongoDB.
